subject: Re: Client Feedback - Blue Ridge Partners Account
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Hackathon today. Here's a summary of what we decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option B for the API Gateway migration (projected savings: $224K/yr)
- Titan launch date moved to Q2 (from original Q2 target)
- Legal team will own the Incident Response workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the Pinnacle Analytics contract timeline? (Jack to investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for DevOps Lead? (Jack to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/365cd446f9cf

Regards,
Miguel
---
Miguel Smith | Senior Software Engineer
Wayneenterprises
M: +1-478-405-7860 | E: miguel.smith@wayneenterprises.com

subject: Re: Client Feedback - Blue Ridge Partners Account
content:
Hi Paul,

Thanks for the update. A few quick thoughts:

- Agreed on the User Directory approach. Chen and I discussed this yesterday and we're aligned.
- For the Finance budget, I'd suggest we cap it at $278K for now and revisit in Q2.
- The NPS score improvement looks promising — let's make sure we have proper monitoring via Analytics Pipeline before going live.

I'll update the Horizon tracker accordingly.

Best,
Miguel

Best,
Miguel Smith
Senior Software Engineer, Operations
Wayneenterprises
